name: Stay in
short_description: This is a casual action horror FPS game with surprises and thrills and jumpscare. Utilize a wide variety of items and various actions to find the suitcase in the pitch-dark hotel where horrifying creatures roam.
detailed_description:
Game Overview

This is a casual action horror FPS game.
This game includes some "JumpScare"s.

The objective is to find a certain suitcase in a hotel, hiding from terrifying creatures and sometimes fighting back.
A variety of actions can be performed on objects.



Attraction
Free exploration and a variety of actions are the main attractions.
Use your imagination and wide variety of items.

This game has multiple endings (two types).



About Streaming
No license is required.
Please feel free to distribute this game and promote it.
